Introduction: Chan says we have to stay here for a long time.#$e#I hope so, I really like this place$h
AcceptBirthdayGift_Positive: Wow you really remembered what I like!#$e#Thank you!$h
GreenRain: Man I don’t like this at all#$e#This rain is spooking me out.$h
GreenRainFinished: Lets just pretend that never happened$h
cc_Begin: That old building in the forest looks pretty run down.#$e# It's a shame no one’s using it for anything.
mineArea_10_oneday: I heard you've been exploring the old mines. That sounds like fun!$h#$e#...I'm working up the courage to go there myself...$s
eventSeen_733330_memory_oneday: Sam and Sebastian asked me to play drums in their band... I've never played drums before, but it's actually pretty fun.#$e#You have to learn how to move your limbs to different rhythms, at the same exact time. I feel like my brain is growing.$h
eventSeen_1_memory_oneweek: Hey, I finally beat the first level of Journey Of The Prairie King! Watching you play helped a lot.
eventSeen_2_memory_oneday: Sebastian mentioned that he heard strange music while having dinner the other night...#$e#I didn't tell him it was us! It seemed better to keep it a mystery.$h
eventSeen_3: The spirits have a mind of their own...$l
dating_Abigail: %Abigail is blushing, but she looks happy.
dating_Abigail_memory_oneyear: Uh... @? We've been dating for almost a year. Is this going anywhere?$s
movieTheater: So long as it’s not scary, I’m happy$h
Resort_Entering: I hope a mermaid visits the beach.
Resort_Leaving: I'm gonna ask Willy if we can take the scenic route back.
Resort_Leaving_2: Maybe we'll see a sea monster on the way back.
Resort_Shore_2: Hmm, you think I could sneak my guinea pig onto the island?#$e#Nah, David's probably not much of a swimmer anyways.$h
Resort_Umbrella: My skin gets burnt really easily. So I'm just gonna stay under this umbrella for a while.#$e#I like it in the shade. Too much sun makes me dizzy.
Resort_Umbrella_2: Hey @, want to build a sand castle with me?#$e#Actually, a sand dungeon might be cooler!$h
Resort_Umbrella_3: Hey @, you think you could build a raft?#$e#I saw a few cool islands on the way here I want to visit.
Resort_Wander: An island this big has got to be hiding some buried treasure.#$e#Quick, get me a shovel!#$e#Relax, I'm just kidding.$h
Resort_Bar: Gus made me a dark purple refresher, to match my hair. It tastes great!$h
Resort: Bummer... Willy says we have to stay on the beach...$s#$b#And I brought my sword and everything...$s
secondChance_Girls: *sigh*... I can't stay mad at you anymore, @. Let's just move on with our lives.$s
breakUp: Oh... Thank you for telling me how you feel...$s#$b#Can you leave me alone for a while$s
Mon: I want to play league, I stayed up too late last night
Mon2: I’m pumped!#$e#Gus said he’ll let me use his kitchen later.
Tue: I wanna go to a prison.$s#$e#A prison of compliments!$a
Tue2: I have Korean practice today, wish me luck.
Wed: Excuse me, I just need to grab something.
Fri: What should I wear for the shoot tomorrow?$u#$e#I think this is too plain.
Fri2: Do you want an egg? I guess you have heaps on your farm though, right?
Sat: I hope we can finish up our activities early today.
Sun: Another week finished. We have a fanmeet in Zuzu city soon.$s
Sun2: I was going to make pancakes for the members but they got messed up...#$q 17/18 Sun_old#@, what do you think happens to us after we die?#$r 17 0 Sun_17#I have no idea.#$r 18 40 Sun_18#We come back as spooky ghosts.#$r 17 0 Sun_17#We go to Heaven.#$r 18 0 Sun_17#Our energy bodies enter the astral plane.#$r 17 30 Sun_nothing#Nothing. We just cease to exist.
Sun_old: $p 17#I guess you think nothing would happen, right?$u|Maybe a wicked ghost would appear!
Sun_nothing: You know, that wouldn't be so bad.$8
Wed2: Hi @. We just finished practice#$e#You should come watch next time if you’re not busy on the farm.
Tue4: Thank you for coming to see me.$h#$e#Its good to take a break.
Sat6: I have a trip to Paris soon. I’ll miss you.$h#$e#Maybe you can come with me, I’ll ask Sungmin to watch the farm.#$e#Interesting. I’d like to be with you there..$l
Mon8: $query PLAYER_NPC_RELATIONSHIP current any married roommate#It seems like yesterday we started this project in the valley. I’m really glad we came here.$h|...Oh, @! Hi.$h#$e#I made some brownies, do you want to try?$h
Thu10: Hi.$l#$e#You’re doing so well on the farm!$l#$b#The plants are so tall.$h
Fri6: I saw a racoon on the way to the shoot today.#$e#It was pretty cool.
Event_VideoGame_Yes: Great! I'm sure you'll be able to beat this level with ease.$h
Event_VideoGame_No: Oh? *sigh*... I guess I'll never get past this level, then...$s
Event_Grave1: See? You understand why I'm out here, then.#$b#I've lived in the valley my whole life, but I've never really done anything memorable. I want to go on an adventure!$8
Event_Grave2: Sure. I don't want to kill anything, either. I just want to do a little exploring without risking my neck!#$b#I've lived in the valley my whole life, but I've never really done anything memorable. I want to go on an adventure!$8
Event_Grave3: Oh, it's because I'm a girl... isn't it? Ugh...$u^Why? I'm just as strong as you!$a#$b#I'm not some fragile princess.. I can take care of myself!$a#$b#I've lived in the valley my whole life, but I've never really done anything memorable. I want to go on an adventure!$8
Event_Grave4: Really? That's surprising.$8#$b#I've lived in the valley my whole life, but I've never really done anything memorable. I want to go on an adventure!$8
Event_Rain_2: Yea... I guess you would be one to appreciate this somber ambience.
Event_Tragic_1: Yeah... I guess my own life is okay...$s
Event_Tragic_3: I would feel better if I could believe that...#$b#But I don't.$s
Event_Cave_2: I guess when you have something to lose, it's normal to be afraid...$l
summer_1: The sun feels so nice!.#$e#I could stay here for hours if I didn’t have so much to do.
summer_Mon: The heat is making my cupcakes cook strangely.
summer_Tue: Don’t work too hard outside in the heat, you’ll get sick.$u
summer_Wed: How do you keep from getting sunburnt on the farm?
summer_6: The beach is so pretty at night. Watch out for the poisonus jellyfish though.#$e#Or is that only at home?
summer_Thu: Its so nice to stay in the hotel air conditioning and play games.
summer_Thu4: I think my plants would die if I was a farmer like you in this heat..$s
summer_Fri: Do you think a sunhat would look good on me?
summer_Sat: I’m enjoying the sun while I can.
summer_Sun: Do you ever get an urge to go exploring, @?#$q 25/26 summer_Sun_old#Okay... pretend you just won a free vacation. Where would you go?#$r 25 0 Sun_25#The beach#$r 26 30 Sun_26#In a dark cave#$r 26 30 Sun_26#The old, gnarled forest#$r 25 0 Sun_25#Joja Mega-Mall
summer_Sun_old: $p 25#I do... but you probably wouldn't like the places I'm thinking about...|Maybe we'll be neighbors someday. I think we both have similar, weird tastes.$h
Sun_25: Huh. I think that would get old fast.
summer_Wed2: Weather like this makes me miss home.#$b#I want to go to the beach and eat ice cream.
summer_Tue4: You know its winter time back home. Its not that cold though.$h
summer_Sat6: What’s your favourite flavour of ice cream?$h#$e#I love blueberry because its blue.
summer_Mon8: I used to think Pelican Town was kinda drab, but lately I'm starting to love some things about it.$h
summer_Thu10: Wow, you look nice today.#$e#I mean, that summer air is really good for the complexion, isn't it?... heh...$l
summer_Fri10: Do you ever get lonely on your farm?
fall_1: Ah... Fall's here!$h#$e#I was getting so tired of summer.
fall_Mon: I need to stretch my legs and get some fresh air today.
fall_Tue: $d joja#I try to help out in the shop on most days. Business has been pretty bad since the Joja Mart opened, though.|Ever since Joja Mart shut down we've been doing great at the shop!$h
fall_Wed: I can't wait to see some pumpkins this year.$h#$e#The spirit's eve festival happens at the end of the season. It's pretty low-key compared to what you'd see in Zuzu City, but for a small town like this it's a lot of fun.
fall_Thu: #$1 AbigailHAND#Last night I dreamt that my left hand had turned into a gigantic %noun. Does that mean anything?#$e#%Abigail doesn't seem to be interested in talking right now.
fall_Sat: $d cc#I can't believe you fixed up that old Community Center all by yourself. I'm really impressed.|Do you have any scarecrows on your farm?
fall_Sun: Hmm... what should I do tonight?#$q 27/28 fall_Sun_old#I was thinking about dyeing my hair again... what do you think?#$r 27 10 Sun_27#Dye it black.#$r 27 10 Sun_27#Why not blonde?#$r 27 20 Sun_WildColor#How about bubblegum pink?#$r 28 0 Sun_28#I like your hair just the way it is!
fall_Sun_old: $p 27#I was going to dye my hair but then I decided against it.|Yes? What is it?
Sun_27: I guess that's a pretty safe choice, huh?#$e#I'll think about it.
Sun_28: Of course that's what you'd say.$u
Sun_WildColor: You're always good for a laugh.$h
fall_Wed2: Are you growing pumpkins on your farm this year?#$e#Save one for me!$h
fall_Tue4: I may fight with my parents a lot, but I know they're just looking out for me. They're doing what they think is best.$s#$b#I dunno why I'm saying this to you. Don't tell anyone.$8
fall_Sat6: Hi.$h#$e#Your hair looks cool today... did you do something different?
fall_Mon8: You know, I could actually see myself becoming a farmer some day...#$e#But how would that ever happen? *chuckle*$l
fall_Thu10: I had an interesting dream last night, with you in it.#$e#It was a good dream.$h
fall_Fri6: I wish the season lasted a little longer.$8#$e#When the wind really picks up, I almost feel like a kid again.
fall_Fri10: I usually feel lonely this time of year, but not anymore.$l#$e#@, what are your plans for the future?
winter_1: Well, fall is over...$s#$e#But I like winter, too!$h
winter_Mon: It's just too cold to go outside much.#$e#But I do enjoy building a snowgoon.$h
winter_Tue: Doesn't a steaming hot cup of cocoa sound good right now?
winter_Wed: Hi. Is it boring to be a farmer during the winter?
spring_12: I'm definitely going to enter the egg hunt tomorrow. Are you?
spring_23: Well, tomorrow is the flower dance. Dancing is alright, but they make me wear this stupid white dress...$s
winter_7: I'm looking forward to making a snow man tomorrow.
fall_26: Will I see you tomorrow at the Spirit's Eve festival? Look for me in the haunted maze.$h
summer_10: Everyone's excited for the Luau tomorrow. Maybe a little nervous, too, considering the Governor will be here.
summer_27: You can't miss tomorrow's festival. It's one of the most beautiful wonders of the valley.
winter_24: I'm going to eat so much cranberry sauce tomorrow.$h
winter_Thu: Another year is almost over.#$e#It goes by so fast, doesn't it?$s
winter_Fri: One thing I've learned living here... everyone stares at you if you look different.
winter_Sat: It's the weekend!#$e#That means I can play twice as many video games.$h#$e#Bye.
winter_Sun: Oh, hello.#$q 29/30 winter_Sun_old#I made these two drawings. What do you think?#$r 29 20 Sun_29#I like the jungle island and the tiger.#$r 30 5 Sun_30#I like the orc with the battleaxe.#$r 29 -50 Sun_Bad#I don't like either of them.
winter_Sun_old: $p 29#Remember those drawings I showed you a while ago? I accidentally threw them away.$s|Remember that drawing I showed you with the orc? I entered it into an online contest and won 50g!$h
Sun_29: Oh yeah? I guess that makes sense.
Sun_30: I'm glad. It's embarrassing to share your art with others. But I think you and I are on the same page.
Sun_Bad: Rude! Why would you hurt my feelings like that? You're so insensitive!$s
winter_Wed2: Hi. If you're ever bored, you can always hang out in my room.#$e#As long as I'm not changing, of course!
winter_Tue4: It's so cold, I wish we had a hot cup of cocoa to share.$h
winter_Sat6: I've been daydreaming a lot lately...#$e#Oh! You want to know what it's about? Well...$u#$b#...It's a secret.$h
winter_Thu10: Another year is almost over...#$b#But this was a really good year, don't you think?$h
winter_Wed6: It must be nice not having crops to worry about this time of year.#$e#And that means you can hang out with me more often!$h
winter_Fri10: @, there's something I want to tell you...#$e#It's just... um... well... your boots! They, uh...look really clean... *gulp*#$e#That's all... *sigh*$s
Wed4: I can't trust a person who doesn't like animals...#$e#Oh, don't worry! I know you're an animal lover!$h
